name: Iowa DIAL Contractor Registration Lookup

agency.name: Iowa Department of Inspections, Appeals, and Licensing

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official contractor registration and license lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Iowa contractor registration records exposed by DIAL and related building, construction, and trades lookup paths
knownExclusions: Iowa contractor registration is not the same as every electrical, plumbing, mechanical, HVAC, or local permit credential.
Local requirements and separate DIAL trade-board records may need separate source entries or adapter filters.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer official bulk or export options if discovered before lookup automation.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, registration, or permit does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Iowa contractor registration research. Future work should separate registration records from trade-license records where needed.
maintainerNotes: Keep registration-versus-license wording clear in future CLI output and docs.
